Blanch asparagus in salted water until bright, with a slight bite or snap
Shock in ice water until fully cold, then reserve to dry towels and pat dry
Lightly cover with oil and season with kosher salt
Pre-heat the grill, then grill until tender and some caramelization shows
Remove from heat and allow to cool
Cut into batons 11cm long (the length of a half sheet of nori, uramaki style)
reserve in quart containers, store in the cooler.
